title: Drive DRC and ERC to zero before fab
description: Resolve every design-rule and electrical-rule violation, distinguishing real errors from intentional waivers, before release.
body: Use when preparing a board for fabrication or assembly handoff. Do not release with unreviewed violations, since a single clearance or connectivity error can scrap a batch. Actions: run DRC and ERC, triage each violation, and document any intentional waiver with rationale. Validation signals include a clean rule check or an explicit waiver list and a connectivity check matching the netlist. Risk boundary: an unwaived short or clearance error can destroy assembled boards, so deny fab release until every violation is resolved or justified.
